description: Modify the API of the PaymentPlatform project by updating the 'processPayment(String customerId, double amount)' method in 'src/main/java/com/acme/payment/PaymentService.java'. Add two new parameters: 'currency' (String) with a default value of "USD", and 'priority' (boolean) with a default value of false. Use the change method signature refactoring to ensure all call sites across the project are updated automatically and the project compiles without errors.
